what_it_does: Defines an SVG clock icon with a circular face and two hands, using currentColor stroke and no fill.
observations: Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor.
Uses stroke-width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the clock face as a circle centered at 12,12 with radius 9.
Draws the hands with a single path from 12,7 to 12,12 to 15,14.
standouts: Constructed from one circle and one path.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions with no fill, currentColor stroke, and rounded stroke styling.
Uses inline SVG elements without metadata, title, or accessibility attributes.
Keeps the SVG on a single line.
concerns: No title, role, aria-label, or aria-hidden attribute is present to indicate accessibility intent.
notes: A compact outline SVG asset representing a clock or time concept.
questions: Should this icon be exposed to assistive technology or treated as decorative?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a clock icon, and the SVG content renders a clock face with hands.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable, color-inheriting clock icon for interface use.
contribution: Provides a small, themeable time icon built from basic stroke geometry that a fused system could keep as a reusable clock visual.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 outline SVG clock icon using currentColor stroke, a circular face, and a two-segment hand path.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing time, schedules, duration, or clock-related actions in a UI icon set.
